results.rendered_html:
gārdhra a. (dhrī f.) [gṛdhrasyāyam aṇ] Derived from a vulture.
— rdhraḥ
1 Greediness (probably for gārdhyaṃ).
2 An arrow.
Comp.
— pakṣaḥ, -vāsas m. an arrow furnished with a vulture's feathers.
